mapper.select: SELECT a.name FROM authority a INNER JOIN role_authority ra ON a.id = ra.authority_id INNER JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE ra.role = #{role} ORDER BY c.name, a.name

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.description, a.category_id, a.created_at, c.name as category_name, c.description as category_description FROM authority a INNER JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id ORDER BY c.name, a.name

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.description, a.category_id, a.created_at, c.name as category_name, c.description as category_description FROM authority a INNER JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE c.name = #{category} ORDER BY a.name

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.description, a.category_id, a.created_at, c.name as category_name, c.description as category_description FROM authority a INNER JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO authority (name, description, category_id, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, NOW())
